name: organic-todo
description: Grove — tasks, focus & memo for desktop

scripts.icons: python scripts/prepare-icon.py && tauri icon public/Grove_icon_square.png && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='public/Grove_icon.png';['src/Grove_icon.png','marketing/Grove_icon.png'].forEach(d=>fs.copyFileSync(p,d));fs.copyFileSync('public/Grove_icon_square.png','assets/tray-icon.png');"

author: Ethan
